items.title: Watch: Pitches, PlayStations and protein ice cream - A look inside Brazil's World Cup base camp
items.dek: BBC's Brandon Livesay toured the Columbia Park Training Facility in Morris Township, New Jersey that will host the team in the coming weeks.
items.body: BBC's Brandon Livesay toured the Columbia Park Training Facility in Morris Township, New Jersey that will host the team in the coming weeks.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: French pair held until trial after boys abandoned by road in Portugal
items.dek: The couple, who allegedly left two young boys on a roadside in the south of Portugal, will remain in custody, a court rules.
items.body: The couple, who allegedly left two young boys on a roadside in the south of Portugal, will remain in custody, a court rules.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Latvia stuns the U.S. 4-2 at ice hockey worlds
items.dek: Sandis Vilmanis scored two empty-net goals to help Latvia upset the United States 4-2 for the defending champion's third loss at the ice hockey world championsh
items.body: Sandis Vilmanis scored two empty-net goals to help Latvia upset the United States 4-2 for the defending champion's third loss at the ice hockey world championship.
items.author: IriLine Desk
